common.canSignIn: You can now sign in with your new password.
common.passwordHintFull: 8 characters minimum, one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit and one special character

metadata.title: Marketplace Service
metadata.description: The B2B platform connecting agencies, freelancers and enterprises

landing.heroTitle: The B2B marketplace that connects agencies, freelancers and enterprises
landing.heroSubtitle: Find the best providers, publish your projects and collaborate with confidence on a platform built for professionals.
landing.agenciesDesc: Manage your team, land missions and grow your business.
landing.freelancesDesc: Find missions matching your skills and manage your invoices.
landing.enterprisesDesc: Publish your projects and find the ideal providers in a few clicks.

auth.registerSubtitle: Choose your professional profile to get started
auth.passwordHint: Minimum 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase and digit
auth.roleAgencyDesc: Manage your missions, your team and your visibility.
auth.roleFreelanceDesc: Manage your missions and grow your activity.
auth.roleEnterpriseDesc: Find the best providers for your projects.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.resetEmailSent: A reset email has been sent to your address. Check your inbox.
auth.invalidLinkDesc: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

dashboard.agencySubtitle: Manage your agency and grow your business
dashboard.providerSubtitle: Manage your missions and grow your activity
dashboard.enterpriseSubtitle: Find the best providers for your projects
